site.title: Laura Trapp | Traveling Bridal & Wedding Hair
site.description: Traveling hairdresser with 20 years behind the chair. On-location bridal and special-event hair, so you can get ready in comfort on your big day.

home.sub_bold: Heart-led, homegrown bridal hair that comes to you.
home.sub_rest: Twenty years behind the chair. I style brides and their parties on location, so the morning of your wedding stays calm and all about you.

modeling.title: BRIDAL HAIR
modeling.intro: I am a traveling hairdresser with twenty years behind the chair. I come to you and style hair for weddings and special events, from the bride to the whole party. Soft waves, classic updos, half-up looks, and color when you want it. Tell me about your day and I will help you plan the right look.

acting.title: THE LOOKS
acting.intro: A few of the looks I love to create. Swap in your own favorites from the admin panel so brides can see your style before they book. There is plenty more on my Instagram.

content-creation.title: FOLLOW ALONG
content-creation.intro: Twenty years of work and a lot of happy brides live over on my Instagram. It is the fastest way to reach me, so send a message and we can talk about your date.

about.title: ABOUT LAURA
paragraphs: Hi, I am Laura. I have spent twenty years creating beauty and connection behind the chair, and these days I bring it to you. As a traveling hairdresser I come to your wedding or event, so there is no rushing across town in your gown. You get ready right where you are and I take care of the hair.

I am a blended mama of eight, so a calm and joyful morning is kind of my specialty. Send me a message on Instagram with your date and what you have in mind, and we can start planning. You can edit this whole story from the admin panel and make it sound just like you.

guide.title: YOUR OFFER
guide.body: Use this space for a price list, a bridal package, or a booking form. Or hide it from the admin panel if you do not need it.

contact.title: Let's talk about your day
contact.intro: The best way to reach me is a message on Instagram. Send your wedding or event date and a little about the look you want, and I will get right back to you.
